heading: Acquisition of real property; construction and operation of lamprey control works; entry into agreements for construction and operation of works
label: 935 Acquisition of real property; construction and operation of lamprey control works; entry into agreements for construction and operation of works
notes: United States Fish and Wildlife Service; Work on Sea Lamprey Program; Reimbursements, , , provided in part that:Pub. L. 101–512, title I104 Stat. 1918Nov. 5, 1990“beginning , and thereafter, the United States Fish and Wildlife Service can perform work for the Great Lakes Fishery Commission, authorized by , Great Lakes Fisheries [Fishery] Act of 1956, on the sea lamprey program on a reimbursable basis: , That such reimbursements are to be treated as Intragovernmental funds as defined in the publication titled ‘A Glossary of Terms Used in the Federal Budget Process’.”October 1, 199016 U.S.C. 931–939cProvided further
amendments: United States Fish and Wildlife Service; Work on Sea Lamprey Program; Reimbursements, , , provided in part that:Pub. L. 101–512, title I104 Stat. 1918Nov. 5, 1990“beginning , and thereafter, the United States Fish and Wildlife Service can perform work for the Great Lakes Fishery Commission, authorized by , Great Lakes Fisheries [Fishery] Act of 1956, on the sea lamprey program on a reimbursable basis: , That such reimbursements are to be treated as Intragovernmental funds as defined in the publication titled ‘A Glossary of Terms Used in the Federal Budget Process’.”October 1, 199016 U.S.C. 931–939cProvided further

children.label: a
children.text: to acquire any real property, or any interest therein, by purchase, exchange, gift, dedication, condemnation, or otherwise;

children.label: b
children.text: to construct, operate, and maintain any project or works designed to facilitate compliance with the provisions of the Convention relating to the sea lamprey control program; and

children.label: c
children.text: to enter into contract or agreement with any State or other public agency or private agency or individual for the construction, operation, or maintenance of any such project or works.
